description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with an aggressive aerodynamic design, featuring a sharply contoured hood and prominent rear wing for enhanced downforce. The body is predominantly white with black accents, including a black front splitter, side skirts, and a large rear diffuser. The windows are tinted dark blue, and the car sits on large, black multi-spoke wheels with red brake calipers visible through the rims. The rear of the car is equipped with dual exhausts and angular red tail lights, emphasizing its high-performance character. The side profile reveals sculpted air intakes and a streamlined roofline, contributing to its sporty and modern appearance. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, handling, and visual impact, making it suitable for urban streets or high-end garages.
description: A white, low-slung sports car with black aerodynamic accents, large black multi-spoke wheels, and a prominent rear wing. Its aggressive styling and tinted windows highlight its high-performance, modern character.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply contoured hood, black front splitter, and wide stance with angular lines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted air intakes, streamlined roofline, and large black wheels with red brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear wing, dual exhausts, angular red tail lights, and black rear diffuser.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic side profile, black wheels, and rear wing.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke black rims with red brake calipers
